TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Carl_XVI_Gustaf, title = Carl_XVI_Gustaf, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Carl_XVI_Gustaf} }

S.FORM: == Carl XVI Gustaf == ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 4, Carl XVI Gustaf, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Sweden ta' misuw hya' ga Carl XVI Gustaf, aring ryax tay 15 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1973 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Carl XVI Gustaf htagan beh sa Solna, Stockholm. Carl XVI Gustaf maki tay kawas 1976 msqun ki Crown Princess Victoria, tehuk misuw qani. Crown Princess Victoria ga, kneril ni Carl XVI Gustaf. maki cyugal laqi nha. Victoria Ingrid Alice D√©sir√©e laqi kneril htgan na ryax 1977 kawas 7 byacing 14 ryax. Carl Philip Edmund Bertil laqi mlikuy htgan na ryax 1979 kawas 5 byacing 13 ryax. Madeleine Th√©r√®se Amelie Josephine laqi kneril htgan na ryax 1989 kawas 6 byacing 10 ryax. 1966 kawas tmasoq gocyu pqwasan biru. mqbaq biru tmasoq biru gocyu lga wal sazing kawas 6 byacing mhetay. Carl XVI Gustaf Uppsala universitet ru Stockholms universitet mqwas biru. musa mosay cingay na qalang ru sakang' sinqqas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Carl XVI Gustaf == ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 4, Carl XVI Gustaf, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Sweden ta' misuw hya' ga Carl XVI Gustaf, aring ryax tay 15 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1973 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Carl XVI Gustaf htagan beh sa Solna, Stockholm. Carl XVI Gustaf maki tay kawas 1976 msqun ki Crown Princess Victoria, tehuk misuw qani. Crown Princess Victoria ga, kneril ni Carl XVI Gustaf. maki cyugal laqi nha. Victoria Ingrid Alice D√©sir√©e laqi kneril htgan na ryax 1977 kawas 7 byacing 14 ryax. Carl Philip Edmund Bertil laqi mlikuy htgan na ryax 1979 kawas 5 byacing 13 ryax. Madeleine Th√©r√®se Amelie Josephine laqi kneril htgan na ryax 1989 kawas 6 byacing 10 ryax. 1966 kawas tmasoq gocyu pqwasan biru. mqbaq biru tmasoq biru gocyu lga wal sazing kawas 6 byacing mhetay. Carl XVI Gustaf Uppsala universitet ru Stockholms universitet mqwas biru. musa mosay cingay na qalang ru sakang' sinqqas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ¶~ ®arl x*i …£us~…ïta* == rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, ¶~ ®arl x*i …£us~…ïta*, s~…ïquliq na s~…ïezi î. (minƒßtuw s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) mrƒßuw s~…ïwe*en ta î mis~…ïuw ƒßja î …£a ¶~ ®arl x*i …£us~…ïta*, ari≈ã rjax taj ** s~…ïqu Œ≤ja ¶~ ®i≈ã taj * s~…ïa kawas~…ï **** l…£a, mus~…ïa î s~…ïpazja≈ã Œ≤alaj ms~…ï îrux kja la. qnxan nja ¶~ ®arl x*i …£us~…ïta* ƒßta…£an Œ≤eƒß s~…ïa s~…ïolna, s~…ïto ¶~ ®kƒßolm. ¶~ ®arl x*i …£us~…ïta* maki taj kawas~…ï **** ms~…ïqun ki ¶~ ®rown prin ¶~ ®es~…ïs~…ï *i ¶~ ®toria, teƒßuk mis~…ïuw qani. ¶~ ®rown prin ¶~ ®es~…ïs~…ï *i ¶~ ®toria …£a, kneril ni ¶~ ®arl x*i …£us~…ïta*. maki ¶~ ®ju…£al laqi nƒßa. *i ¶~ ®toria i≈ãri* ali ¶~ ®e **s~…ïir*e laqi kneril ƒßt…£an na rjax **** kawas~…ï * Œ≤ja ¶~ ®i≈ã ** rjax. ¶~ ®arl pƒßilip e*mun* Œ≤ertil laqi mlikuj ƒßt…£an na rjax **** kawas~…ï * Œ≤ja ¶~ ®i≈ã ** rjax. ma*eleine tƒß*r*s~…ïe amelie *os~…ïepƒßine laqi kneril ƒßt…£an na rjax **** kawas~…ï * Œ≤ja ¶~ ®i≈ã ** rjax. **** kawas~…ï tmas~…ïoq …£o ¶~ ®ju pqwas~…ïan Œ≤iru. mqŒ≤aq Œ≤iru tmas~…ïoq Œ≤iru …£o ¶~ ®ju l…£a wal s~…ïazi≈ã kawas~…ï * Œ≤ja ¶~ ®i≈ã mƒßetaj. ¶~ ®arl x*i …£us~…ïta* upps~…ïala uni*ers~…ïitet ru s~…ïto ¶~ ®kƒßolms~…ï uni*ers~…ïitet mqwas~…ï Œ≤iru. mus~…ïa mos~…ïaj ¶~ ®i≈ãaj na qala≈ã ru s~…ïaka≈ã î s~…ïinqqas~…ï. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î
